name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Registration
notes: This building block detects modifications to the list of agents registered in Exchange
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Registration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
when the event matches Filename (custom) contains any of agents.conf
when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\transportroles\agents\%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\transportroles\shared\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Registration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) contains any of agents.conf
AND when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\transportroles\agents\%' or LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%\transportroles\shared\%' AQL filter query
